economic_notes: Musqueam has extensive real estate and marine business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Includes proportionate consolidation of MST Development Corporation (1/3 interest) and MST Employment & Training Society (1/3 interest). Earnings from GBEs: real estate $2,157,991 and marine $2,366,553. Reconciliation agreement lands of $65,068,037 from 2008 agreement.
notes: Complex consolidation: 37+ fully consolidated subsidiaries including numbered companies, land limited partnerships, housing societies, and proportionate consolidation of MST Development Corporation (1/3) and MST Employment & Training Society (1/3). An additional 51+ government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method (real estate and marine). Ottawa Trust Funds of $5,776,670 held on behalf of members by Government of Canada included in cash resources. Reconciliation agreement lands of $65,068,037 recorded as non-financial asset. Investments in GBEs decreased from $167,955,288 to $147,346,301 (decline of ~$20.6M). Large increase in deferred revenue from $23,743,520 to $32,713,465. Prepaid expenses jumped from $573,714 to $18,601,223 - unusual large increase. Capital lease obligations of $362,216 also included in debt. Remuneration schedule referenced but not included in extracted text.
